description: ETag conditional GET returns 304 Not Modified
rawRequest:
── Initial GET (capture ETag) ──
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
Connection: keep-alive



── Conditional GET (If-None-Match) ──
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: 127.0.0.1:<PORT>
If-None-Match: "no-etag"
rawResponse:
── Initial GET (capture ETag) ──
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
content-length: 2
connection: keep-alive
x-powered-by: Dart with package:bottom_shelf
date: <DATE>

OK

── Conditional GET (If-None-Match) ──
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
content-length: 2
connection: keep-alive
x-powered-by: Dart with package:bottom_shelf
date: <DATE>

OK
